input: user-group-item hypergraph (group membership and user-item interactions)
output: ranked list of items for a group
backbone: disentangled hypergraph neural network with masked autoencoder
loss: reconstruction loss (masked feature reconstruction) + recommendation loss (e.g., BPR)
key_idea: mask and reconstruct node/hyperedge features to create self-supervised signals without data augmentation, and disentangle member/item representations during hypergraph convolution
